about.title: About Me
about.description: Hello, my name is Juan Cruz Dauberte and I am 22 years old. I am a passionate person when it comes to technology, especially software development and data analysis. I am currently finishing my 4th year of the Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science at the National University of San Antonio de Areco (UNSAdA), and at the same time I am pursuing studies in Data Science and Analysis at the University of Buenos Aires and the National University of San Martín. I have experience in software development on both the client and server side, in the design and administration of relational and non-relational databases, and in data analysis focused on data preparation, modeling, and visualization. I also have knowledge in computer networking and process automation, which allows me to approach solutions in a more comprehensive way within an IT environment. I really enjoy working in teams, innovating ideas, and having conversations with other professionals to learn from them. Today I am looking to contribute to initiatives that drive both my professional and personal growth, while generating a positive impact within the organization and the people around it. Thank you for your time!
about.descriptionBesides: I really enjoy sports and I'm passionate about physical activities. I love playing football with my friends, going to the gym, and playing padel. In my free time, I enjoy programming and coming up with ideas for new challenges and projects. Thank you very much for your time!
